name: glean-plugins
description: Official Glean plugins for Claude Code - enterprise knowledge integration

plugins.name: glean-core
plugins.description: Core Glean MCP integration - provides shared skills, tool guidance, and MCP configuration. Required foundation for all other Glean plugins.

plugins.name: glean-search
plugins.description: Enterprise search across documents, Slack, email, and other sources via Glean. Requires glean-core.

plugins.name: glean-people
plugins.description: Find experts, understand org structure, and identify stakeholders via Glean. Requires glean-core.

plugins.name: glean-meetings
plugins.description: Meeting intelligence - analyze transcripts, prepare for meetings, and catch up after time off via Glean. Requires glean-core.

plugins.name: glean-docs
plugins.description: Document intelligence - analyze docs, verify specs against implementation, and onboard to new areas via Glean. Requires glean-core.

plugins.name: glean-code
plugins.description: Cross-repository code exploration - search code across your org, find examples, identify code owners, and discover similar implementations via Glean. Requires glean-core.

plugins.name: glean-dev-docs
plugins.description: Access Glean's developer documentation - search API references, SDK guides, and integration tutorials via the Glean Developer Docs MCP Server.

plugins.name: glean-skills
plugins.description: Discover and create Claude Code skills from Glean work patterns

plugins.name: glean-productivity
plugins.description: Personal productivity tools - daily briefings, weekly summaries, and activity analysis via Glean. Requires glean-core.

plugins.name: glean-project
plugins.description: Project handoff documents - generate comprehensive handoff docs when transitioning project ownership via Glean. Requires glean-core.
